items.html: Now we shall explain the matter of the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] in the Nukva [female] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and from her we shall learn about the others. We have already explained that all these discernments of the Melachim [kings] are called by the name BON [the filling of HaVaYaH amounting to 52]. Therefore know and understand: MAN anywhere, plainly stated, are alluded to by the name BON. Yet there must necessarily be the discernment of the MAN themselves, and also the discernment of the Kli [vessel] itself in which the MAN are placed — to which our sages alluded in saying, "A woman makes a covenant only with him who made her a vessel." This is why a woman does not conceive from the first intercourse: for in the first intercourse he made in her the discernment of the Kli, and thenceforth there is a place for the MAN to be depicted within it, and then she conceives.
